Healing • Purpose • Restoration

Healing Hands Ministry

A luxury-inspired, peaceful space that reflects faith, healing, restoration, and purpose. Founded by Soraya, Healing Hands Ministry was created to encourage, uplift, and help people move from broken places into hope, truth, and wholeness.

Shop Oils & Book Read My Story

About Me

I am Soraya, founder of Healing Hands Ministry, CEO of LocksOfLove Oils, and author of Unbroken: My Story in Finding Redemption After The Storm. My heart is to serve, encourage, and remind others that even after life’s hardest seasons, healing is still possible.

Healing Hands Ministry reflects my calling to meet people with compassion, faith, and truth. Through encouragement, outreach, and personal testimony, I want women and families to know that God can restore what pain tried to steal. This ministry is a place for real healing, real hope, and real purpose.

My Mission

My mission is to help people heal emotionally, spiritually, and personally by creating a safe, faith-centered space where they can feel seen, supported, and strengthened. Healing Hands Ministry exists to pour love, encouragement, practical support, and hope into lives that need restoration.

Purpose

The purpose of Healing Hands Ministry is to serve as a vessel of healing and compassion. It was built to remind people that their story is not over, their pain does not define them, and that God can bring beauty, strength, and new life out of every storm.

Vision

My vision is to build a ministry that reaches women, families, and communities through outreach, encouragement, authorship, testimony, and faith-based resources. I see Healing Hands Ministry becoming a place where broken hearts are restored and people are empowered to rise again with purpose.

Leadership

Soraya leads with compassion, resilience, and a heart to serve. As CEO of LocksOfLove Oils and founder of Healing Hands Ministry, she blends healing, entrepreneurship, and ministry to create something both beautiful and impactful.

Author

A glimpse into the heart behind Unbroken: My Story in Finding Redemption After The Storm.

Unbroken

Unbroken: My Story in Finding Redemption After The Storm shares a journey through pain, survival, faith, and healing. It is a testimony of what it means to keep moving forward when life has tried to break you.

This book gives readers a small window into the storms I have faced and the redemption God has brought through them. It speaks to the woman who has been wounded, the person who has felt overlooked, and anyone who needs to know that healing can still happen.

Unbroken is more than a title. It is a declaration that after every storm, there is still strength, still purpose, and still a future.
